_comment: DRAFT — cross-checked via two independent fetches of https://www.bmg.org.uk/become-a-guide/prerequisites/ (2026-07-12), the second asking for verbatim quotes only. Numbers below were consistent across both passes EXCEPT one alpine sub-rule from the first pass ('5 routes must be 800m+ mixed') which did NOT reappear on the verbatim pass and has been removed as likely fabricated — a concrete example of why every 'verified' field here is still false. Read the live page yourself, correct anything wrong (see 'alpine areas' note below in particular), flip 'verified' to true per rule, THEN hand this file to Fable for Phase 2. Do not seed the app from this file unverified.

rules.description: Multi-pitch UK trad routes at E1 5b or above, led or alternate-led, across Scotland/England/Wales
rules.source_note: "At least 50 multi-pitch climbs E1 5b or above" — CONFIRM exact wording/number on live page

rules.description: Snow and ice climbs, Grade III or harder, UK
rules.source_note: part of "at least 60 snow and ice climbs" total — CONFIRM breakdown

rules.description: Of the above, at Grade V or harder
rules.source_note: "20 must be Grade V+" — CONFIRM exact number

rules.description: Icefall/cascade climbs WI4+, Alps or equivalent
rules.source_note: CONFIRM exact number and whether 'or equivalent' regions are defined anywhere

rules.description: Ascents of major alpine summits, over a minimum span of years
rules.source_note: "Twenty ascents of major summits ... over a minimum period of at least four years" and "at least three" Alpine areas — consistent across both fetches, still CONFIRM wording on live page

rules.description: Of the above, at TD or harder
rules.source_note: "ten of which must be TD or harder" — consistent across both fetches, still CONFIRM

rules.description: Of the above, multi-day hut-based tours (3+ consecutive nights)
